source: worldperatio.com country baskets (trailing P/E) · India=NSE Nifty 50 · US CAPE=multpl.com
note: Trailing P/E. Non-India figures use worldperatio's consistent country-basket methodology (operating earnings) for cross-country comparability — these are broad baskets and can differ from a single headline index. India uses NSE Nifty 50 to match the Dashboard. Non-India bands are the p25-p75 of each market's own P/E history, which extends daily; India uses a static long-run reference band.
